---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new artifact, command, collection, or capability for context-bazaar
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

_What can't you do today, or what does the current behavior make harder than it should be? Be specific — "it would be nice if" is less useful than "I can't do X because Y"._

## Who is affected

_Is this a problem for artifact authors, end users installing via `/plugin`, contributors to the forge tool, or all three?_

- [ ] Artifact authors (`forge new`, `forge validate`, `forge build`)
- [ ] End users (plugin install, MCP bridge, catalog browse)
- [ ] forge tool contributors (CLI, adapters, schemas, tests)
- [ ] All

## Proposed solution

_Describe what you'd like. If it's a new forge command, sketch the interface:_

```bash
forge <command> [options]
```

_If it's a new artifact type or collection, describe the domain and what guidance it would provide._

_If it's a UI or catalog change, describe the user experience._

## Which harnesses does this affect

<!-- Check all that apply, or "All" if harness-agnostic. Delete if not relevant. -->

- [ ] All
- [ ] kiro
- [ ] claude-code
- [ ] copilot
- [ ] cursor
- [ ] windsurf
- [ ] cline
- [ ] qdeveloper

## Alternatives considered

_What workarounds exist today? Why aren't they good enough?_

## Prior art

_Does this exist in a comparable tool, library, or knowledge system? A link or brief description helps ground the proposal._

## Acceptance criteria

_How would you know this feature is done? List 2–4 concrete things that must be true._

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Additional context

_Mockups, example outputs, related issues, or anything else that helps._
